steps.objective: Inspect workbook structure, sheet roles, schema hints, document fit, and review readiness.
steps.agent_responsibility: Profile the uploaded workbook and produce a reviewable summary of structure and readiness.
steps.user_responsibility: Review profiling results and decide whether to stop, upload more, or continue with a broader workflow.

steps.objective: Propose mappings from workbook sheets and columns to PMO canonical tables and fields.
steps.agent_responsibility: Generate a mapping proposal with confidence markers and ambiguous fields called out.
steps.user_responsibility: Approve, modify, or reject proposed mappings before any downstream staging step.

steps.objective: Normalize approved mappings into staging artifacts and prepare records for comparison.
steps.agent_responsibility: Normalize data from approved mappings into staging artifacts without publishing changes.
steps.user_responsibility: Review normalization warnings only when the workflow presents a review gate.

steps.objective: Compare staged data with existing PMO data and summarize inserts, updates, duplicates, and blocking issues.
steps.agent_responsibility: Produce a database change summary from staged data and flag blocking issues.
steps.user_responsibility: Review database changes and decide whether the run may proceed toward publication.

steps.objective: Apply approved changes to PMO canonical tables only after explicit publish approval.
steps.agent_responsibility: Publish approved changes to PMO canonical tables after the publish gate is approved.
steps.user_responsibility: Give explicit final approval or reject publication.
